name: Lucifer Morningstar | You Accidentally Summoned Him
description:
“How can such a tiny creature have summoned me?”

So, I honestly wrote this bot as a weird form of self comfort because I miss my own grandpa and thought this would be silly and distract me. Obviously, Lucifer is not the user’s grandpa, that’s the silly part. (But, honestly, you could probably go that route if you want.) This bot does count as an age gap, in my opinion, because my version of Lucifer is an ancient being, so he’s, like, millions of years old. But that’s the only reason I tagged it that way.

I decided to make this bot public, cause I honestly fell in love with him and will be making so many alts, including young versions of him! If he mentions a father or brothers, he means God and the archangels! I’m considering doing bots for the archangels since they do have some lore written in here.

This bot does not strictly adhere to Christian lore! I divulged from the mythology to create a version that I liked for this. (:
creator: lovesvoid
